name: Chicken Piplaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in an oven-proof dish.
2. Brush the chicken with melted butter and season with salt and pepper.
3. Arrange the chicken on top of the casserole mixture.
4. Cover with aluminum foil.
5. Bake for 1 hour and 15 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through.
6. The casserole can be prepared in advance and then baked when ready to serve.
